name: LiveChat
body: [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by "}, {"text": "LiveChat", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://www.livechatinc.com/", "children": [{"text": "Visit add-on Website!"}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "LiveChat is an online customer service software with live support, help desk software, and analytics functions. LiveChat uses a website chat widget, embedded in your Neto webstore, so that customers can engage directly with you while browsing."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Benefits & Features"}], "data-id": "benefits-features"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With "}, {"text": "LiveChat", "bold": true}, {"text": " you can:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Chat directly with customers on your website."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Send canned responses to common questions."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Monitor your website traffic."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Analyse the efficiency of your staff."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "And more."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Setup Instructions"}], "data-id": "setup-instructions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up the LiveChat add-on on your Neto\u00a0webstore:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your\u00a0Neto control panel navigate to the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Support & Live Chat section, find the LiveChat add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Get App", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the pop-up window, click the "}, {"text": "Get App", "bold": true}, {"text": " button, and you'll be taken to the LiveChat sign up page."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a free trial account with LiveChat by entering your email address. If you already have a LiveChat account, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://my.livechatinc.com/", "children": [{"text": "log in to your account"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Install LiveChat code manually", "bold": true}, {"text": " option, and copy the code that appears."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Search for "}, {"text": "Custom Scripts", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click on it."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add New", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " (e.g. LiveChat) for your script."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Paste the code you copied earlier into the "}, {"text": "Page Footer", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab of the scripts section."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. A pop-up appears to verify your identity. Follow the steps to confirm your actions."}]}]}]}]
